channel.title: cozy-soup-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh cozy-soup-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Roasted Carrot Soup with Fresh Herbs for Cozy Dinners
item.description: This creamy carrot soup is a comforting bowl of warmth with a fresh twist from herbs. Slow-roasting the carrots brings out their natural sweetness, making it perfect for chilly evenings or a light lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 pounds fresh carrots, peeled and cut into chunks
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream or coconut milk
  • 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Roasted Carrot Soup with Fresh Herbs for Cozy Dinners
media:content.media:description: This creamy carrot soup is a comforting bowl of warmth with a fresh twist from herbs. Slow-roasting the carrots brings out their natural sweetness, making it perfect for chilly evenings or a light lunch.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, olive, medium

item.title: Silky Carrot and Ginger Soup with a Cozy Zing
item.description: This carrot and ginger soup is velvety smooth with a fresh zing from ginger. Slow simmering brings out deep, comforting flavors that are perfect for chilly evenings or when you need a little warmth.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 5 large carrots, peeled and chopped
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • 1/2 cup coconut milk (optional, for creaminess)
  • Fresh parsley or chives for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Silky Carrot and Ginger Soup with a Cozy Zing
media:content.media:description: This carrot and ginger soup is velvety smooth with a fresh zing from ginger. Slow simmering brings out deep, comforting flavors that are perfect for chilly evenings or when you need a little warmth.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, medium, cloves

item.title: Cozy Chicken and Wild Rice Soup That Warms You Right Up
item.description: This chicken and wild rice soup is everything you want on a chilly night—rich, hearty, and packed with tender chicken and nutty wild rice. Slow-simmered with fresh herbs, it’s a soothing bowl of comfort any time you need a little warmth.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 celery stalks, diced
  • 2 carrots, diced
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 6 cups low-sodium chicken broth
  • 1 cup wild rice, rinsed
  • 2 cups cooked chicken, shredded
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1 teaspoon dried parsley
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream (optional)
  • Fresh parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #medium #celery

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Chicken and Wild Rice Soup That Warms You Right Up
media:content.media:description: This chicken and wild rice soup is everything you want on a chilly night—rich, hearty, and packed with tender chicken and nutty wild rice. Slow-simmered with fresh herbs, it’s a soothing bowl of comfort any time you need a little warmth.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, medium, celery

item.title: Velvety Roasted Cauliflower Soup That Warms You Right Up
item.description: This soup is pure comfort in a bowl, with roasted cauliflower adding a deep, nutty flavor. It’s smooth, creamy, and perfect for chilly spring nights or anytime you want something soothing and simple.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large head cauliflower, chopped into florets
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream or coconut milk
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional garnish: chopped parsley or toasted nuts

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Velvety Roasted Cauliflower Soup That Warms You Right Up
media:content.media:description: This soup is pure comfort in a bowl, with roasted cauliflower adding a deep, nutty flavor. It’s smooth, creamy, and perfect for chilly spring nights or anytime you want something soothing and simple.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, olive, medium

item.title: Fresh Pea and Mint Soup with a Refreshing Twist for Spring Evenings
item.description: This fresh pea and mint soup is a light yet satisfying dish that brightens chilly spring nights. The mint adds a lively freshness that makes it feel special. Perfect for a cozy starter or a light supper!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt or crème fraîche (optional, for creaminess)
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Pea and Mint Soup with a Refreshing Twist for Spring Evenings
media:content.media:description: This fresh pea and mint soup is a light yet satisfying dish that brightens chilly spring nights. The mint adds a lively freshness that makes it feel special. Perfect for a cozy starter or a light supper!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Creamy Mushroom and Pea Soup That Warms You Right Up
item.description: This creamy mushroom and pea soup is a cozy, easy one-pot meal packed with fresh peas and earthy mushrooms. It’s perfect for chilly nights when you want something warm and comforting without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 12 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 2 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
  • Optional: crusty bread for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom and Pea Soup That Warms You Right Up
media:content.media:description: This creamy mushroom and pea soup is a cozy, easy one-pot meal packed with fresh peas and earthy mushrooms. It’s perfect for chilly nights when you want something warm and comforting without fuss.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Mango Flan Cake: Silky Tropical Custard with Fresh Mango and Caramel
item.description: This mango flan cake blends a creamy custard with fresh mango slices and a rich caramel base. The water bath baking technique ensures a smooth, silky texture that holds its shape but melts on the tongue. It’s a refreshing dessert that captures tropical flavors, ideal for warm weather gatherings or anytime you want a cool, elegant treat.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 60 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 80 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup (200g) granulated sugar (for caramel)
  • 4 large eggs (200g), room temperature
  • 1 (14 oz / 400g) can sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 (12 fl oz / 355ml) can evaporated milk
  • 1 cup (240ml) whole milk
  • 1 tsp (5ml) pure vanilla extract
  • 2 ripe mangoes (about 500g total), peeled and sliced thinly
  • Optional: pinch of salt in custard for balance

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #granulated #large #sweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Mango Flan Cake: Silky Tropical Custard with Fresh Mango and Caramel
media:content.media:description: This mango flan cake blends a creamy custard with fresh mango slices and a rich caramel base. The water bath baking technique ensures a smooth, silky texture that holds its shape but melts on the tongue. It’s a refreshing dessert that captures tropical flavors, ideal for warm weather gatherings or anytime you want a cool, elegant treat.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, granulated, large, sweetened

item.title: Creamy Spinach and Artichoke Dip: A Balanced and Flavorful Classic
item.description: This recipe walks you through crafting a creamy spinach and artichoke dip that balances rich textures and fresh flavors. Detailed steps show how to prepare the ingredients for the creamiest results and why slow baking creates a golden, slightly crispy crust that contrasts beautifully with the soft interior.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 225g (8 oz) fresh spinach, roughly chopped (or substitute 150g/5 oz frozen spinach, thoroughly drained)
  • 240g (8 oz) canned artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
  • 170g (6 oz) cream cheese, softened
  • 120ml (1/2 cup) sour cream
  • 120ml (1/2 cup) mayonnaise
  • 100g (1 cup) grated mozzarella cheese
  • 50g (1/2 cup) grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/4 tsp (1g) salt, adjust to taste
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) black pepper
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) crushed red pepper flakes (optional)
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #canned #cream

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Spinach and Artichoke Dip: A Balanced and Flavorful Classic
media:content.media:description: This recipe walks you through crafting a creamy spinach and artichoke dip that balances rich textures and fresh flavors. Detailed steps show how to prepare the ingredients for the creamiest results and why slow baking creates a golden, slightly crispy crust that contrasts beautifully with the soft interior.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, canned, cream

item.title: Creamy Mushroom and Asparagus Soup Recipe
item.description: This creamy mushroom and asparagus soup blends the earthiness of mushrooms with the bright freshness of asparagus and herbs. The recipe focuses on preserving the vegetables’ texture while creating a smooth, velvety base. It explains how cooking timing and ingredient prep influence flavor and mouthfeel.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 200g (7 oz) cremini or white mushrooms, cleaned and sliced
  • 150g (5 oz) fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2.5 cm (1 inch) pieces
  • 1 medium yellow onion (150g), finely diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 30g (2 tbsp) unsalted butter
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) olive oil
  • 750ml (3 cups) vegetable or chicken broth, low sodium
  • 100ml (1/3 cup + 1 tbsp) heavy cream
  • 1 tsp fresh thyme leaves (or 1/2 tsp dried thyme)
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional garnish: chopped fresh parsley or chives

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cremini #fresh #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom and Asparagus Soup Recipe
media:content.media:description: This creamy mushroom and asparagus soup blends the earthiness of mushrooms with the bright freshness of asparagus and herbs. The recipe focuses on preserving the vegetables’ texture while creating a smooth, velvety base. It explains how cooking timing and ingredient prep influence flavor and mouthfeel.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cremini, fresh, medium

item.title: Classic Strawberry Shortcake Recipe with Buttermilk Biscuits
item.description: A straightforward recipe for strawberry shortcake featuring tender buttermilk biscuits, sweet macerated strawberries, and lightly whipped cream. Learn how buttermilk affects biscuit texture and how to macerate strawberries for balanced sweetness and juiciness, creating a refreshing dessert ideal for summer gatherings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Classic Strawberry Shortcake Recipe with Buttermilk Biscuits
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for strawberry shortcake featuring tender buttermilk biscuits, sweet macerated strawberries, and lightly whipped cream. Learn how buttermilk affects biscuit texture and how to macerate strawberries for balanced sweetness and juiciness, creating a refreshing dessert ideal for summer gatherings.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: Roasted Cabbage with Caramelized Edges and Crispy Broil Finish
item.description: A straightforward roasted cabbage recipe that highlights natural sweetness through caramelization and finishes with a broil for crispness. This method ensures tender layers with a slight crunch, ideal as a side for casual dinners or comforting weekend meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium green cabbage (about 1.5 kg / 3.3 lbs), cut into 6-8 wedges
  • 3 tbsp (45 ml) olive oil
  • 1 tsp (5 g) fine sea salt
  • 1/2 tsp (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 tsp (2 g) smoked paprika or ground cumin for subtle smoky flavor

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Roasted Cabbage with Caramelized Edges and Crispy Broil Finish
media:content.media:description: A straightforward roasted cabbage recipe that highlights natural sweetness through caramelization and finishes with a broil for crispness. This method ensures tender layers with a slight crunch, ideal as a side for casual dinners or comforting weekend meals.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, olive

item.title: Roasted Cabbage Wedges Wrapped in Crispy Bacon
item.description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage wedges into a satisfying side by wrapping them in smoky, crisp bacon before roasting. The slow caramelization of the cabbage edges combined with the fat rendered from the bacon creates a dish rich in aroma and texture, ideal for colder evenings or festive meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium head of green cabbage (about 1.5 lbs / 680 g), cut into 8 wedges
  • 8 slices of thick-cut bacon (about 200 g), preferably smoked
  • 2 tablespoons (30 ml) olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon (5 g) kosher salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 teaspoon (1 g) smoked paprika for extra depth

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #slices #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Roasted Cabbage Wedges Wrapped in Crispy Bacon
media:content.media:description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage wedges into a satisfying side by wrapping them in smoky, crisp bacon before roasting. The slow caramelization of the cabbage edges combined with the fat rendered from the bacon creates a dish rich in aroma and texture, ideal for colder evenings or festive meals.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, slices, olive

item.title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter Glaze
item.description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage into a side dish that’s crispy on the edges and tender in the center. Roasting with a garlic butter glaze adds rich aroma and a caramelized finish that complements both casual dinners and special occasions. It’s a straightforward technique that highlights how roasting can elevate humble vegetables.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large green cabbage (about 1.5 kg / 3.3 lbs)
  • 4 tbsp (60 g) unsalted butter, melted
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp (15 ml) olive oil
  • 1 tsp (5 g) kosher salt, divided
  • 1/2 tsp (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (15 ml) lemon juice or apple cider vinegar for brightness
  • Optional garnish: fresh parsley or chives, finely chopped

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #unsalted #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter Glaze
media:content.media:description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage into a side dish that’s crispy on the edges and tender in the center. Roasting with a garlic butter glaze adds rich aroma and a caramelized finish that complements both casual dinners and special occasions. It’s a straightforward technique that highlights how roasting can elevate humble vegetables.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, unsalted, cloves

item.title: Easter Basket Brownies with Mini Candy Eggs
item.description: A straightforward recipe for Easter basket brownies featuring mini candy eggs hidden inside for a subtle crunch. This treat combines rich, fudgy brownies with the seasonal charm of spring, making it a reliable choice for family gatherings or holiday dessert tables.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 40 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 16

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 170g (6 oz) unsalted butter
  • 200g (1 cup) granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 65g (2/3 cup) unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 95g (3/4 cup) all-purpose flour (can substitute with gluten-free flour blend)
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp baking powder
  • 150g (1 cup) mini candy eggs (such as chocolate-coated malted milk eggs)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #unsalted #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easter Basket Brownies with Mini Candy Eggs
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for Easter basket brownies featuring mini candy eggs hidden inside for a subtle crunch. This treat combines rich, fudgy brownies with the seasonal charm of spring, making it a reliable choice for family gatherings or holiday dessert tables.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, unsalted, granulated, large
